response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack software engineer with strong web/backend credentials but no demonstrable background in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, deep-learning workload optimization, or hardware-software co-design. The role requires deep hardware architecture expertise (SIMD/MIMD, GPU architecture, DNN training/inference optimization) which is absent from the resume. Educational background (BS in CS) would require 8+ years of relevant technical experience, but the relevant experience here is in application software, not performance architecture or hardware.
strengths: Long track record (15+ years) in software engineering across multiple stacks
Low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (high-throughput HTTP services)
C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on engineering measurement tooling
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware design, or AI accelerator experience
No deep-learning workload, GPU architecture, or SIMD/MIMD background
Skill set centered on web/full-stack development, not performance architecture or hardware-software co-design

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or DNN optimization background
